top3.sql:
SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND c.borderColor = 'black'
  AND c.layout = 'normal'
  AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%'
  AND fd.language = 'French';

SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND c.borderColor = 'black'
  AND c.layout = 'normal'
  AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%'
  AND fd.language = 'French';

SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND c.borderColor = 'black'
  AND c.layout = 'normal'
  AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%'
  AND fd.language = 'French';

SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND c.borderColor = 'black'
  AND c.faceName IS NOT NULL
  AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%'
  AND fd.language = 'French';

final.sql:
SELECT fd.name
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE c.artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson'
  AND c.borderColor = 'black'
  AND c.layout = 'normal'
  AND c.type LIKE '%Creature%'
  AND fd.language = 'French';
